Localization.Description: A child process of the AutoElevate utility is run to bypass User Account Control (UAC). UAC allows a program to escalate privileges to perform a task with administrator-level permissions, possibly prompting the user for confirmation.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} bypassed UAC using utility {object.process.parent.name} and ran process {object.process.name} with escalated privileges on host {event_src.host}
